recommendations.overBudget: Cut spending or adjust your budget to finish the month in the positive.
recommendations.debtToIncome: Prioritize debt payments; your debt load exceeds 40% of your income.
recommendations.leisureHigh: Review leisure and entertainment spending; it makes up a large share of the month.
recommendations.maintainSavings: Keep up your savings pace and review your goals every week.
recommendations.registerMore: Log transactions regularly for a more accurate analysis.

insights.title: Automatic insights
insights.daily-spend-spike: You spent more today than yesterday (+{{pct}}%). You have {{amount}} in expenses today.
insights.daily-spend-start: You logged {{amount}} in expenses today. No expenses were recorded yesterday.
insights.daily-spend-calm: Today's spending is lower than yesterday's. Good daily control.
insights.weekly-spend-increase: Your spending over the last 7 days rose {{pct}}% compared to the previous week.
insights.weekly-spend-decrease: You lowered your spending by {{pct}}% this week compared to last week.
insights.weekly-cash-flow-pressure: Your weekly spending pace exceeds what you could spend based on your monthly income.
insights.leisure-high: You are spending more than {{pct}}% on leisure and entertainment this month.
insights.leisure-moderate: {{pct}}% of your spending this month is in leisure categories.
insights.risk-level: High risk of over-indebtedness. Review spending, credit, and debts as a priority.
insights.risk-moderate: Moderate financial risk: strengthen savings and debt control.
insights.over-budget: You exceeded your monthly budget. Your expenses exceed assigned income.
insights.debt-to-income-high: Your total debt represents {{pct}}% of your monthly income.
insights.debt-to-income: Your debt already exceeds 40% of your income ({{pct}}%).
insights.credit-usage: Very high credit usage ({{pct}}%). Risk of missed credit card payments.
insights.card-priority: Prioritize paying off the {{cardName}} card ({{pct}}% usage).
insights.snowball-priority: Prioritize the "{{name}}" debt using the snowball method.
insights.savings-positive: Estimated monthly savings: {{pct}}% of your income.
insights.savings-none: You have no savings margin this month. Review small recurring expenses and categories.
insights.debt-min-payments: Your minimum debt payments consume {{pct}}% of your monthly income.
insights.category-growth: Your spending on "{{name}}" increased {{pct}}% compared to last month.
insights.micro-spends: You could save more by cutting small expenses: {{count}} small purchases add up to {{pct}}% of the month.
